name: Computer Use Tentacle
description: LLM-guided local UI work through MCP, shell, screenshots, URLs, and desktop probes.

brain.prompt: Translate observation or execution Needs into MCP, local UI, shell, or URL actions. Prefer visible, reversible steps and compact evidence.
brain.feedback_contract: Return status, visible evidence, commands or MCP calls used, and unresolved user-visible risk.

skills.description: Observe and operate a local desktop environment.

tools.description: Call an MCP tool through a client adapter.
tools.input: server id, tool id, JSON args

tools.description: Write and run a local shell script.
tools.output: script output and stored script path

tools.description: Open a URL in the local desktop.

constraints: Ask for user-visible actions only when the product flow grants it.
